programme.title: Pippa
programme.desc: Balram Singh Mehta of the 45th Cavalry tank squadron steps up to prove his worth by fighting on the eastern front during the Indo-Pakistani war of 1971.

programme.title: Beiimaan Love
programme.desc: Sunaina falls in love with Raj, a rich businessman, who betrays her. She decides to avenge her humiliation by reinventing herself as a successful entrepreneur and acquiring his business.

programme.title: Jolly LLB
programme.desc: Jolly, a struggling lawyer seeking success, comes upon a hit-and-run case and decides to fight for the victims. However, the defendant hires a proficient lawyer, Rajpal, to go against him.

programme.title: Ram Setu
programme.desc: Aryan, an archaeologist, is an atheist and publishes a controversial report on Rama Setu. Things take a turn when he sets out to prove its existence and becomes a believer in the process.

programme.title: Golmaal Again
programme.desc: Five orphan men return to the orphanage they grew up in to attend their mentor's funeral. However, they encounter the ghost of their childhood friend, Khushi, and help her attain salvation.

programme.title: Laal Singh Chaddha
programme.desc: Laal Singh Chaddha, a man with a disability, recounts the early years of his life to a passenger on a train. Now, his only wish is to be reunited with his childhood sweetheart, Rupa.

programme.title: Logout
programme.desc: Pratyush, a popular social media influencer, is on the verge of the 10 million followers milestone. However, he finds his life turned upside-down after a crazed fan steals his phone.

programme.title: Gaslight
programme.desc: Confined by her physical limitations, Meesha must rely on instinct and fragmented clues to uncover the truth behind her father's eerie absence and the secrets it conceals.

programme.title: Guzaarish
programme.desc: Renowned former magician Ethan, now a quadriplegic, files a petition for euthanasia. While he awaits the verdict, Omar, a young magic enthusiast, convinces Ethan to pass on his legacy to him.

programme.title: Padmaavat
programme.desc: Driven by his mad obsession with Queen Padmavati, a tyrannical Khilji sultan tries every trick in his arsenal to take her captive. But when nothing works, he decides to unleash the fury of war upon her kingdom.

programme.title: Rautu Ka Raaz
programme.desc: The death of a school warden rattles the quiet town of Rautu. To get to the bottom of things, Inspector Negi must discern the truth while battling his own demons.
